metadata.description: Open collection of Claude Code skills: AWS architecture diagrams, AWS-themed presentations (myslide), SVG diagram generation, academic paper search, YouTube transcript extraction, AgentCore Browser automation via CDP, SD3.5 Large image generation on Bedrock, Strands Agents SDK development, Kiro CLI delegation, and professional README generation.

plugins.name: paper-finder
plugins.description: Academic paper search and discovery across Semantic Scholar, OpenAlex, and ArXiv APIs. Supports keyword search, ArXiv ID/DOI lookup, BibTeX export, and markdown output

plugins.name: svg-diagram
plugins.description: Generate pixel-perfect SVG diagrams, banners, and architecture visuals with anti-overlap rules. Supports hero banners, architecture diagrams, flowcharts, pipelines, and dark-mode compatible graphics

plugins.name: aws-diagram
plugins.description: Generate professional AWS architecture diagrams with official service icons, guaranteed orthogonal (right-angle) arrow routing, VPC/AZ/Subnet container nesting, and dual SVG/PPTX output. Python engine handles layout and routing deterministically from JSON definitions. Follows AWS Architecture Icon Deck guidelines. Trigger on: AWS diagram, architecture diagram, aws-diagram, draw architecture, 아키텍처 다이어그램

plugins.name: myslide
plugins.description: Create professional AWS-themed PPTX presentations with dark gradient backgrounds, SVG architecture diagrams, and conversational slide editing. Uses AWS reInvent design system (Amazon Ember fonts, orange/magenta/purple palette, content card patterns). Supports creating from scratch, editing specific slides by number, and team-based parallel generation for large decks. Trigger on: AWS presentation, AWS slides, myslide, AWS themed deck, make slides, create presentation

plugins.name: youtube-script
plugins.description: YouTube transcript extractor. Extracts captions and subtitles from YouTube videos and saves as text files. Supports auto-generated and manual captions in multiple languages

plugins.name: sd35l
plugins.description: Stable Diffusion 3.5 Large image generation on Amazon Bedrock (us-west-2). Text-to-image and image-to-image (style transfer / variation) with seed-based reproducibility, strong prompt adherence, and photorealistic output. Triggers: generate image, stable diffusion, sd35, text to image, 이미지 생성, 그림 그려

plugins.name: strandsagents
plugins.description: Build autonomous AI agents with the AWS Strands Agents SDK using a live-documentation workflow. Checks the installed/latest SDK version and fetches official docs at run time before writing code. Covers @tool decorators, multi-agent patterns (agents-as-tools, swarm, graph), and Bedrock integration. Triggers: strands, strands agents, multi-agent, 스트랜즈

plugins.name: kiro
plugins.description: Delegate tasks to Kiro CLI when context window is insufficient or independent AI analysis is needed. Runs Kiro in non-interactive mode with a prompt, captures clean results. For large document analysis, code QA, summarization, or second-opinion tasks. Triggers: kiro, delegate to kiro, ask kiro, context 부족, 키로

plugins.name: readme
plugins.description: Create beautiful, professional README.md files with logos, badges, screenshots, GIFs, architecture diagrams, and polished formatting. Covers open-source libraries, CLI tools, web apps, APIs, internal projects, ML projects, and monorepos. Based on 100+ curated best practices from the awesome-readme community

plugins.name: agentcore-browser
plugins.description: AWS Bedrock AgentCore Browser automation via CDP over WebSocket. Python-native cloud browser control without local Chrome. Use as fallback/complement to agent-browser when CLI is unavailable, on headless servers, for Python async integration, or VPC-internal site access. Triggers on: AgentCore browser, AWS headless browser, managed browser, CDP on Bedrock, agentcore-browser
